title: alguelagum salviae
intro: Alguelagum salviae, also known as Sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Alguelagum salviae include improving cognitive function, memory, and reducing the risk of age-related cognitive decline, as well as supporting respiratory health by relieving coughs and sore throats. Herbal preparations of Alguelagum salviae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
